Precious tiny moments.

text: It rains quite a bit in this region. I’m used to it now after five adventuresome months. Living within a mainly off grid system, I am now more attuned to the subtle and sharp changes in weather.

raw.full_text: It rains quite a bit in this region. I’m used to it now after five adventuresome months. Living within a mainly off grid system, I am now more attuned to the subtle and sharp changes in weather.

text:
When it rains, I think of our cistern levels; the next activities of the week that need little or heavy consumption. I watch the rainwater collecting through a chain hanging from a rooftop corner, in wonder.

So simple, yet a powerful design.

raw.full_text:
When it rains, I think of our cistern levels; the next activities of the week that need little or heavy consumption. I watch the rainwater collecting through a chain hanging from a rooftop corner, in wonder.

text: When it is sunny, I watch now periodically the battery in the casita I live in. This is where the monitoring of power systems lives (bathroom and open basement).

raw.full_text: When it is sunny, I watch now periodically the battery in the casita I live in. This is where the monitoring of power systems lives (bathroom and open basement).

text:
When we are on solar power, a few hours of direct sunlight with normal consumption can charge the battery back to 100 easily.

As soon as I awake, my first thought is: how much % do we have for today?
